demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult child present and helping today

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I stand up the room spins, my stomach churns, and I just can't get out of bed. My daughter is having to bring me everything today.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been getting worse over the last three days and now I'm too dizzy and sick to get up — my daughter got worried and told me to call.

symptom_narrative.onset: started getting worse about three days ago
symptom_narrative.duration: three days this time, but I get spells like this with my condition
symptom_narrative.character: dizzy and the room spins when I stand; my stomach feels full and churny and I feel really sick
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — I can't get out of bed without nearly passing out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my head goes all swimmy when I stand, and it's my stomach for the nausea and bloating
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worst when I stand up or try to move around; better when I lie flat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying flat or sitting back down settles the dizziness
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up, and I can't keep much fluid down because of the nausea
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: completely wiped out, a heavy leaden tiredness; feeling sick and bloated so I'm barely eating or drinking
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get flares of this from time to time with my nerve/autonomic condition, but this one feels worse than usual
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: stuck in bed today, need my daughter to bring me fluids, and I'm scared I'll fall if I try to get to the toilet on my own

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a condition where my body doesn't control my blood pressure and my digestion properly — I've had tests and I'm under a specialist for it
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: a while ago, still being worked up
past_medical_history.how_managed: fluids, extra salt, and being careful when I stand up

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home; her adult daughter is with her today helping with fluids and getting around

objective_data_offered.value: she looks very pale and washed out, tired, and is talking and moving slowly
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: family member's impression on video, not a clinical assessment

objective_data_offered.value: she's too unsteady and dizzy to stand up without help
she's barely been able to drink today because the nausea keeps stopping her
